title: gymnadenia × trummeriana
intro: Gymnadenia × trummeriana, also known as the Trummer's Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species derived from the cross between Gymnadenia conopsea and Gymnadenia densiflora. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gymnadenia × trummeriana are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
